name: Chocolate Mint Meringue Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, melted margarine, and sugar; press onto bottom of 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in mint chocolate chips and vanilla. Pour mixture over the crust.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 50 minutes. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill.
4. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add marshmallow creme, beating until stiff peaks form. Carefully spread over top of cheesecake to seal.
5. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 3 to 4 minutes or until lightly browned.
